raw.message: Become the Sorting Master! Match 3 goods to clear the shelves. Relieve stress and train your brain.

hook.summary: A hand sorts colorful corn on a shelf to create a match.
hook.visual_action: A hand taps an orange corn, moving it to a shelf with two other orange corns, causing them to clear with a satisfying effect.

scene_flow: Hand moves orange corn to complete a set of three on a wooden shelf.
Hand moves purple corn to complete a set of three on a wooden shelf.
Hand moves red corn to complete a set of three on a wooden shelf.
Hand moves blue corn to complete a set of three on a wooden shelf.
Transition to a final screen showing various grocery items and a 'Play' button.
audience_proxy: Casual gamers who enjoy satisfying organization and sorting puzzles.
